_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Agile delivery involves encouraging teams to build incrementally, test and iterate their work based on regular feedback and other useful data.
reference_document_element_description: Translate research findings into production-applicable methods, working with engineering teams to operationalize novel approaches.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-T-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-A-003 (OP, cosine: 0.357), DA-T-011 (DA, cosine: 0.340).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.8/10 (raw 0.479). Shared vocabulary: [teams]. DDaT-only terms [agile, based, build, data, delivery, encouraging] vs WIDAI-only terms [applicable, approaches, engineering, findings, methods, novel] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.854 (P=0.847, R=0.863). Balanced P/R — the 21-word DDaT element and 14-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.2%). "Agile delivery involves encouraging teams to build incrementally, test and itera" and "Translate research findings into production-applicable methods, working with eng" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.406 < STS 0.479 (gap -0.073). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [agile, based, build] and [applicable, approaches, engineering] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.1%. Shared tokens: [teams]. DDaT-only: [agile, based, build, data, delivery, encouraging]. WIDAI-only: [applicable, approaches, engineering, findings, methods, novel].
